name: Sarah Millican
bio: Sarah Millican is an English comedian from South Shields known for frank, conversational stand-up about relationships, the body and everyday life delivered in a warm North East voice. A former civil servant, she won the Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Newcomer in 2008 with a show inspired by her divorce. Her live DVDs are among the best-selling by a female comedian and she hosted The Sarah Millican Television Programme on BBC Two.

timeline.ev: Wins the Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Newcomer with Not Nice
The Sarah Millican Television Programme begins on BBC Two
Releases the best-selling DVD Chatterbox Live
Outsider tour and DVD reach number one in the comedy chart
Late Bloomer launches on Netflix, her first special on the platform

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Newcomer (2008)
British Comedy Award for Best Female Comedy Breakthrough Artist
Among the best-selling stand-up DVDs by a female comedian
